rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes when referring to component ports.
Use visible feature names and concrete bounds for input assumptions and output guarantees in component type contracts.
generic_rules: Formulate range guarantees using boolean helper declarations for clarity and reuse.
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq` for defining boolean helper variables in AGREE contracts.
Structure AGREE annex blocks with proper scoping and closing syntax.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts.
